_comment: Manual Spotify artist-ID overrides for bands whose name is ambiguous on Spotify search (e.g. generic names that match a more popular act, or bands listed under a slightly different spelling). The resolver consults this file before calling search_artist. Keys are the band name as it appears in wacken_2026.json; values are Spotify artist IDs (the part after open.spotify.com/artist/).

low_track_count_notes.Novelization: Only 1 song available on Spotify; mark permanently_unresolved after retry captures it.
low_track_count_notes.Maschine: Dieter 'Maschine' Birr — only 1 song available on Spotify; mark permanently_unresolved after retry captures it.
